## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Innerwell and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, CMS implementation, and link building progress.](https://fathom.video/share/TYU8zuoi6otaVCQrckhHpVsndsYe5W4L?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Psychedelic therapy page to be restructured, clarifying differences between integration and ketamine-assisted therapy](https://fathom.video/share/TYU8zuoi6otaVCQrckhHpVsndsYe5W4L?tab=summary&timestamp=317.0)
  - [CMS walkthrough completed; blog implementation straightforward, location pages need further clarification](https://fathom.video/share/TYU8zuoi6otaVCQrckhHpVsndsYe5W4L?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)
  - [Link building efforts transitioning to new lead (Jason); update and strategy to be presented next week](https://fathom.video/share/TYU8zuoi6otaVCQrckhHpVsndsYe5W4L?tab=summary&timestamp=2628.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Updates

  - [Service and location page edits to be applied across 10-15 pages by Monday](https://fathom.video/share/TYU8zuoi6otaVCQrckhHpVsndsYe5W4L?tab=summary&timestamp=109.0)
  - [Psychedelic therapy page to be reworked, distinguishing between integration and ketamine-assisted therapy](https://fathom.video/share/TYU8zuoi6otaVCQrckhHpVsndsYe5W4L?tab=summary&timestamp=317.0)
  - [Blog content (18-20 posts) ready for publication; team to backdate for even distribution](https://fathom.video/share/TYU8zuoi6otaVCQrckhHpVsndsYe5W4L?tab=summary&timestamp=1556.0)
  - [Image sourcing: Innerwell to provide existing stock library; GrowthX to develop AI-generated imagery workflow](https://fathom.video/share/TYU8zuoi6otaVCQrckhHpVsndsYe5W4L?tab=summary&timestamp=2366.0)

### CMS Implementation

  - [Prismic CMS walkthrough completed for blog posts and location pages](https://fathom.video/share/TYU8zuoi6otaVCQrckhHpVsndsYe5W4L?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Blog implementation relatively straightforward; includes table of contents, rich text, and image options](https://fathom.video/share/TYU8zuoi6otaVCQrckhHpVsndsYe5W4L?tab=summary&timestamp=1482.0)
  - [Location pages more complex; require copying existing state-specific insurance information](https://fathom.video/share/TYU8zuoi6otaVCQrckhHpVsndsYe5W4L?tab=summary&timestamp=1922.0)
  - [CTA configuration varies based on page type and desired user flow](https://fathom.video/share/TYU8zuoi6otaVCQrckhHpVsndsYe5W4L?tab=summary&timestamp=2293.0)

### Link Building Progress

  - [Transition in leadership: Jimmy departed, Jason now heading link building efforts](https://fathom.video/share/TYU8zuoi6otaVCQrckhHpVsndsYe5W4L?tab=summary&timestamp=2634.0)
  - [Stats blogs to be leveraged for initial backlinking push](https://fathom.video/share/TYU8zuoi6otaVCQrckhHpVsndsYe5W4L?tab=summary&timestamp=2649.0)
  - [Jason to join next week's call to present comprehensive link building strategy](https://fathom.video/share/TYU8zuoi6otaVCQrckhHpVsndsYe5W4L?tab=summary&timestamp=2752.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to apply edits across service and location pages](https://fathom.video/share/TYU8zuoi6otaVCQrckhHpVsndsYe5W4L?tab=summary&timestamp=118.0)

  - [GrowthX to rework psychedelic therapy page, clarifying service distinctions](https://fathom.video/share/TYU8zuoi6otaVCQrckhHpVsndsYe5W4L?tab=summary&timestamp=515.0)
  - [Innerwell to send image library for content use](https://fathom.video/share/TYU8zuoi6otaVCQrckhHpVsndsYe5W4L?tab=summary&timestamp=2532.0)
  - [GrowthX publisher to review CMS walkthrough recording](https://fathom.video/share/TYU8zuoi6otaVCQrckhHpVsndsYe5W4L?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)
  - [Jason (link building lead) to join next week's call with strategy update](https://fathom.video/share/TYU8zuoi6otaVCQrckhHpVsndsYe5W4L?tab=summary&timestamp=2752.0)
